name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for AgentBridge
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. (e.g. support a new messenger or AI agent adapter).

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or diagrams about the feature request here.
